0.1.1-alpha.description:
# Alpha v0.1.1

> [!WARNING]
> Welcome to the first playable release of Slay the Spire II Archipelago!
> Both Slay the Spire II and this Archipelago Mod are in active development. As such, while this *is* playable, expect there to be bugs and limited features. We appreciate your playtesting!

# Changelist

- Fixed a bug where new players would skip past the Archipelago Connection UI, making the game unplayable for them.

# Mod Information

## Pre-Requisites

- **Your Slay the Spire II client must be running on Windows**. The debug terminal we use uses Win32 APIs.
  - This will not be a requirement long-term, but for early Alpha development it's necessary. 
- **Your host MUST use Archipelago Client v0.6.7+**.
  - The current official release is v0.6.6, so you need to be able to build the `main` branch of Archipelago [from source](https://github.com/ArchipelagoMW/Archipelago) or download and use the [0.6.7 RC](https://github.com/ArchipelagoMW/Archipelago/releases/tag/0.6.7-rc1).
  - **However**, once the game has been generated, it can still be hosted on [www.archipelago.gg](www.archipelago.gg)
- If your installation of Slay the Spire II is **higher than v0.98** this mod _may_ not work. We will do our best to keep up with game updates as they release.
- Friends that are forgiving and understanding so that if your multi-hour run breaks due to a bug, they won't mind :smile:

> [!CAUTION]
> This is an *extremely* early build, the product of not even a week of development. Until it's further along, the pre-requisites are very tight, fragile, and technical.

## What's Included

- Locations for Card Rewards, Rare Card Rewards, Relics, and Pressing Start with a Character
- Card Rewards, Rare Card Rewards, Character Unlocks, and Relics in the Item Pool
- Configurable Goal for beating the game with 1-5 characters
- Configurable Ascension Level *(Highly recommend using 1+, or you may not reach all Relic Rewards in logic)*
- Configurable Characters to use in the Archipelago
- Configurable: Either all Card Rewards are AP Locations, or every other card reward is an AP Location

> [!IMPORTANT]
> There's not a lot of settings but we wanted to get a playable build out as quick as possible so people can dive in. More features and stability coming very soon!

## What's **NOT** Included

- **Multiplayer Support**
  - This is a popular request, but it will not be something we work on until *everything else* is stable.
- Shopsanity
- Goldsanity
- Progressive Rest/Smith
- Death Link
- Traps
- Interesting Filler Items
- Polish

## Known Issues/Limitations

- There is no saving.
  - If you exit the game then reboot it, you might have problems.
  - If you end a run early and find a way to resume it, you WILL have problems.
- If you receive a Character Unlock while you're on the Character Select screen, they won't unlock until you revisit that screen after doing a run (likely an edge case for most)
- Every time you click a Card Reward in the Archipelago Loot UI, it will close that window, and to get subsequent Card Rewards you've received, you need to re-open the menu
- Card Rewards, if skipped, are not returned until the next run. This is different than Slay the Spire 1's implementation. It will likely change in the future.
- Originally, we were going to support the setting that allows all Characters unlocked from the start, but that will take some more debugging before it's ready for primetime
- While all Relics and Card Rewards are unlocked for you automatically, the only Potions you can receive are the Potions you start the game with. Any Potion locked behind an Epoch will not show up.

## Common Q&A

### Will this mess with my Save File?

My understanding is that when StS runs modded, it uses a different set of Save Files. So your *vanilla* save files should be totally unbothered by this mod.

### I installed the AP World but it's not working

Is your Archipelago Launcher v0.6.7 or later? If not it **won't work**. You either need an official build, or if none is out yet, you need to build it from the source code!

### I closed out of the game and it's behaving weird when I re-open it

This is very early development, we expect it not to work right and not to save progress when you close the game.

### (Your-Feature-Here) looks really ugly or isn't polished

We probably know and are going to work on it, but if it's egregious or an edge case, please reach out and let us know more about it so we can look into it!
0.1.1-alpha.title: v0.1.1-alpha

0.2.0-alpha.description:
# Alpha v0.2.0

> [!WARNING]
> Welcome to the first playable release of Slay the Spire II Archipelago!
> Both Slay the Spire II and this Archipelago Mod are in active development. As such, while this *is* playable, expect there to be bugs and limited features. We appreciate your playtesting!

# Changelist

- Floorsanity is now available
- Fixed an issue where the "Enable Tutorials?" dialog would pop-up when a run is started
- Fixed an issue where the Reward Screen would not show up after a fight when `shuffle_all_cards` is set to `false`
- Fixed an issue where every other Archipelago Location was skipped when `shuffle_all_cards` is set to `false` (i.e. only odd numbered Card Reward Locations were obtainable in-game)

# Mod Information

## Pre-Requisites

- **Your Slay the Spire II client must be running on Windows**. The debug terminal we use uses Win32 APIs.
  - This will not be a requirement long-term, but for early Alpha development it's necessary. 
- **Your host MUST use Archipelago Client v0.6.7+**.
  - The current official release is v0.6.6, so you need to be able to build the `main` branch of Archipelago [from source](https://github.com/ArchipelagoMW/Archipelago) or download and use the [0.6.7 RC](https://github.com/ArchipelagoMW/Archipelago/releases/tag/0.6.7-rc1).
  - **However**, once the game has been generated, it can still be hosted on [www.archipelago.gg](www.archipelago.gg)
- If your installation of Slay the Spire II is **higher than v0.98** this mod _may_ not work. We will do our best to keep up with game updates as they release.
- Friends that are forgiving and understanding so that if your multi-hour run breaks due to a bug, they won't mind :smile:

> [!CAUTION]
> This is an *extremely* early build, the product of not even a week of development. Until it's further along, the pre-requisites are very tight, fragile, and technical.

## What's Included

- **NEW**: Floorsanity
- Locations for Card Rewards, Rare Card Rewards, Relics, and Pressing Start with a Character
- Card Rewards, Rare Card Rewards, Character Unlocks, and Relics in the Item Pool
- Configurable Goal for beating the game with 1-5 characters
- Configurable Ascension Level *(Highly recommend using 1+, or you may not reach all Relic Rewards in logic)*
- Configurable Characters to use in the Archipelago
- Configurable: Either all Card Rewards are AP Locations, or every other card reward is an AP Location

> [!IMPORTANT]
> There's not a lot of settings but we wanted to get a playable build out as quick as possible so people can dive in. More features and stability coming very soon!

## What's **NOT** Included

- **Multiplayer Support**
  - This is a popular request, but it will not be something we work on until *everything else* is stable.
- Shopsanity
- Goldsanity
- Progressive Rest/Smith
- Death Link
- Traps
- Interesting Filler Items
- Polish

## Known Issues/Limitations

- There is no saving.
  - If you exit the game then reboot it, you might have problems.
  - If you end a run early and find a way to resume it, you WILL have problems.
- If you receive a Character Unlock while you're on the Character Select screen, they won't unlock until you revisit that screen after doing a run (likely an edge case for most)
- Every time you click a Card Reward in the Archipelago Loot UI, it will close that window, and to get subsequent Card Rewards you've received, you need to re-open the menu
- Card Rewards, if skipped, are not returned until the next run. This is different than Slay the Spire 1's implementation. It will likely change in the future.
- Originally, we were going to support the setting that allows all Characters unlocked from the start, but that will take some more debugging before it's ready for primetime
- While all Relics and Card Rewards are unlocked for you automatically, the only Potions you can receive are the Potions you start the game with. Any Potion locked behind an Epoch will not show up.

## Common Q&A

### Will this mess with my Save File?

My understanding is that when StS runs modded, it uses a different set of Save Files. So your *vanilla* save files should be totally unbothered by this mod.

### I installed the AP World but it's not working

Is your Archipelago Launcher v0.6.7 or later? If not it **won't work**. You either need an official build, or if none is out yet, you need to build it from the source code!

### I closed out of the game and it's behaving weird when I re-open it

This is very early development, we expect it not to work right and not to save progress when you close the game.

### (Your-Feature-Here) looks really ugly or isn't polished

We probably know and are going to work on it, but if it's egregious or an edge case, please reach out and let us know more about it so we can look into it!

# Alpha v0.2.1

> [!WARNING]
> Welcome to the first playable release of Slay the Spire II Archipelago!
> Both Slay the Spire II and this Archipelago Mod are in active development. As such, while this *is* playable, expect there to be bugs and limited features. We appreciate your playtesting!

# Changelist

- Fixed a bug where the floor count wasn't factoring in what Act you were on, making Floorsanity Checks for Acts 2 & 3 impossible to reach

# Mod Information

## Pre-Requisites

- **Your Slay the Spire II client must be running on Windows**. The debug terminal we use uses Win32 APIs.
  - This will not be a requirement long-term, but for early Alpha development it's necessary. 
- **Your host MUST use Archipelago Client v0.6.7+**.
  - The current official release is v0.6.6, so you need to be able to build the `main` branch of Archipelago [from source](https://github.com/ArchipelagoMW/Archipelago) or download and use the [0.6.7 RC](https://github.com/ArchipelagoMW/Archipelago/releases/tag/0.6.7-rc1).
  - **However**, once the game has been generated, it can still be hosted on [www.archipelago.gg](www.archipelago.gg)
- If your installation of Slay the Spire II is **higher than v0.98** this mod _may_ not work. We will do our best to keep up with game updates as they release.
- Friends that are forgiving and understanding so that if your multi-hour run breaks due to a bug, they won't mind :smile:

> [!CAUTION]
> This is an *extremely* early build, the product of not even a week of development. Until it's further along, the pre-requisites are very tight, fragile, and technical.

## What's Included

- **NEW**: Floorsanity
- Locations for Card Rewards, Rare Card Rewards, Relics, and Pressing Start with a Character
- Card Rewards, Rare Card Rewards, Character Unlocks, and Relics in the Item Pool
- Configurable Goal for beating the game with 1-5 characters
- Configurable Ascension Level *(Highly recommend using 1+, or you may not reach all Relic Rewards in logic)*
- Configurable Characters to use in the Archipelago
- Configurable: Either all Card Rewards are AP Locations, or every other card reward is an AP Location

> [!IMPORTANT]
> There's not a lot of settings but we wanted to get a playable build out as quick as possible so people can dive in. More features and stability coming very soon!

## What's **NOT** Included

- **Multiplayer Support**
  - This is a popular request, but it will not be something we work on until *everything else* is stable.
- Shopsanity
- Goldsanity
- Progressive Rest/Smith
- Death Link
- Traps
- Interesting Filler Items
- Polish

## Known Issues/Limitations

- **Neow seems to be replaced with a basic encounter**. I don't know why but I'm working on it.
- There is no saving.
  - If you exit the game then reboot it, you might have problems.
  - If you end a run early and find a way to resume it, you WILL have problems.
- If you receive a Character Unlock while you're on the Character Select screen, they won't unlock until you revisit that screen after doing a run (likely an edge case for most)
- Every time you click a Card Reward in the Archipelago Loot UI, it will close that window, and to get subsequent Card Rewards you've received, you need to re-open the menu
- Card Rewards, if skipped, are not returned until the next run. This is different than Slay the Spire 1's implementation. It will likely change in the future.
- Originally, we were going to support the setting that allows all Characters unlocked from the start, but that will take some more debugging before it's ready for primetime
- While all Relics and Card Rewards are unlocked for you automatically, the only Potions you can receive are the Potions you start the game with. Any Potion locked behind an Epoch will not show up.

## Common Q&A

### Will this mess with my Save File?

My understanding is that when StS runs modded, it uses a different set of Save Files. So your *vanilla* save files should be totally unbothered by this mod.

### I installed the AP World but it's not working

Is your Archipelago Launcher v0.6.7 or later? If not it **won't work**. You either need an official build, or if none is out yet, you need to build it from the source code!

### I closed out of the game and it's behaving weird when I re-open it

This is very early development, we expect it not to work right and not to save progress when you close the game.

### (Your-Feature-Here) looks really ugly or isn't polished

We probably know and are going to work on it, but if it's egregious or an edge case, please reach out and let us know more about it so we can look into it!

0.2.2-alpha.description:
# Alpha v0.2.2

> [!WARNING]
> Both Slay the Spire II and this Archipelago Mod are in active development. As such, while this *is* playable, expect there to be bugs and limited features. We appreciate your playtesting!

# Changelist

- All Potions are unlocked automatically now
- All Ancients are unlocked automatically now
- When you select a Card Reward in the Archipelago Loot window, once the card has been selected, the player is returned to the Archipelago Loot window instead of having to re-open it themselves each time
- Fixed a bug where Neow never shows up at the start of a run
- Fixed a bug where receiving a Notification can occasionally crash the game by improving the thread-safety of the notification UI
- Chore: Messages printed out by the Archipelago Mod are now included in the log files for Slay the Spire II

# Mod Information

## Pre-Requisites

- **Your Slay the Spire II client must be running on Windows**. The debug terminal we use uses Win32 APIs.
  - This will not be a requirement long-term, but for early Alpha development it's necessary. 
- **Your host MUST use Archipelago Client v0.6.7+**.
  - The current official release is v0.6.6, so you need to be able to build the `main` branch of Archipelago [from source](https://github.com/ArchipelagoMW/Archipelago) or download and use the [0.6.7 RC](https://github.com/ArchipelagoMW/Archipelago/releases/tag/0.6.7-rc1).
  - **However**, once the game has been generated, it can still be hosted on [www.archipelago.gg](www.archipelago.gg)
- If your installation of Slay the Spire II is **higher than v0.98** this mod _may_ not work. We will do our best to keep up with game updates as they release.
- Friends that are forgiving and understanding so that if your multi-hour run breaks due to a bug, they won't mind :smile:

## What's Included

- Locations for Card Rewards, Rare Card Rewards, Relics, and Pressing Start with a Character
- Card Rewards, Rare Card Rewards, Character Unlocks, Relics, and Filler Gold in the Item Pool
- Floorsanity
- Configurable Goal for beating the game with 1-5 characters
- Configurable Ascension Level *(Highly recommend using 1+, or you may not reach all Relic Rewards in logic)*
- Configurable Characters to use in the Archipelago
- Configurable: Either all Card Rewards are AP Locations, or every other card reward is an AP Location

> [!IMPORTANT]
> There's not a lot of settings but we wanted to get a playable build out as quick as possible so people can dive in. More features and stability coming very soon!

## What's **NOT** Included

- **Multiplayer Support**
  - This is a popular request, but it will not be something we work on until *everything else* is stable.
- Shopsanity
- Goldsanity
- Progressive Rest/Smith
- Death Link
- Traps
- Interesting Filler Items
- Polish

## Known Issues/Limitations

- There is no saving.
  - If you exit the game then reboot it, you might have problems.
  - If you end a run early and find a way to resume it, you WILL have problems.
- If you receive a Character Unlock while you're on the Character Select screen, they won't unlock until you revisit that screen after doing a run (likely an edge case for most)
- Card Rewards, if skipped, are not returned until the next run. This is different than Slay the Spire 1's implementation. It will likely change in the future.
- Originally, we were going to support the setting that allows all Characters unlocked from the start, but that will take some more debugging before it's ready for primetime

## Common Q&A

### Will this mess with my Save File?

My understanding is that when StS runs modded, it uses a different set of Save Files. So your *vanilla* save files should be totally unbothered by this mod.

### I installed the AP World but it's not working

Is your Archipelago Launcher v0.6.7 or later? If not it **won't work**. You either need an official build, or if none is out yet, you need to build it from the source code!

### I closed out of the game and it's behaving weird when I re-open it

This is very early development, we expect it not to work right and not to save progress when you close the game.

### (Your-Feature-Here) looks really ugly or isn't polished

We probably know and are going to work on it, but if it's egregious or an edge case, please reach out and let us know more about it so we can look into it!
0.2.2-alpha.title: v0.2.2

0.2.3-alpha.description:
# Alpha v0.2.3

> [!WARNING]
> Both Slay the Spire II and this Archipelago Mod are in active development. As such, while this *is* playable, expect there to be bugs and limited features. We appreciate your playtesting!

# Changelist

- Profile selection is now disabled
- Added build step to generate the mod manifest without changing our existing file structure

# Mod Information

## Pre-Requisites

- **Your Slay the Spire II client must be running on Windows**. The debug terminal we use uses Win32 APIs.
  - This will not be a requirement long-term, but for early Alpha development it's necessary. 
- **Your host MUST use Archipelago Client v0.6.7+**.
  - The current official release is v0.6.6, so you need to be able to build the `main` branch of Archipelago [from source](https://github.com/ArchipelagoMW/Archipelago) or download and use the [0.6.7 RC](https://github.com/ArchipelagoMW/Archipelago/releases/tag/0.6.7-rc1).
  - **However**, once the game has been generated, it can still be hosted on [www.archipelago.gg](www.archipelago.gg)
- If your installation of Slay the Spire II is **higher than v0.99** this mod _may_ not work. We will do our best to keep up with game updates as they release.
- Friends that are forgiving and understanding so that if your multi-hour run breaks due to a bug, they won't mind :smile:

## What's Included

- Locations for Card Rewards, Rare Card Rewards, Relics, and Pressing Start with a Character
- Card Rewards, Rare Card Rewards, Character Unlocks, Relics, and Filler Gold in the Item Pool
- Floorsanity
- Configurable Goal for beating the game with 1-5 characters
- Configurable Ascension Level *(Highly recommend using 1+, or you may not reach all Relic Rewards in logic)*
- Configurable Characters to use in the Archipelago
- Configurable: Either all Card Rewards are AP Locations, or every other card reward is an AP Location

> [!IMPORTANT]
> There's not a lot of settings but we wanted to get a playable build out as quick as possible so people can dive in. More features and stability coming very soon!

## What's **NOT** Included

- **Multiplayer Support**
  - This is a popular request, but it will not be something we work on until *everything else* is stable.
- Shopsanity
- Goldsanity
- Progressive Rest/Smith
- Death Link
- Traps
- Interesting Filler Items
- Polish

## Known Issues/Limitations

- **The game does not auto release when the Goal is met.** This will be updated in v0.2.4-alpha.
- There is no saving.
  - If you exit the game then reboot it, you might have problems.
  - If you end a run early and find a way to resume it, you WILL have problems.
- If you receive a Character Unlock while you're on the Character Select screen, they won't unlock until you revisit that screen after doing a run (likely an edge case for most)
- Card Rewards, if skipped, are not returned until the next run. This is different than Slay the Spire 1's implementation. It will likely change in the future.
- Originally, we were going to support the setting that allows all Characters unlocked from the start, but that will take some more debugging before it's ready for primetime

## Common Q&A

### Will this mess with my Save File?

My understanding is that when StS runs modded, it uses a different set of Save Files. So your *vanilla* save files should be totally unbothered by this mod.

### I installed the AP World but it's not working

Is your Archipelago Launcher v0.6.7 or later? If not it **won't work**. You either need an official build, or if none is out yet, you need to build it from the source code!

### I closed out of the game and it's behaving weird when I re-open it

This is very early development, we expect it not to work right and not to save progress when you close the game.

### (Your-Feature-Here) looks really ugly or isn't polished

We probably know and are going to work on it, but if it's egregious or an edge case, please reach out and let us know more about it so we can look into it!
0.2.3-alpha.title: v0.2.3-alpha

alpha.description:
# Alpha v0.1.0 - 1st Fully Playable Release! (MVP)

> [!WARNING]
> Welcome to the first playable release of Slay the Spire II Archipelago!
> Both Slay the Spire II and this Archipelago Mod are in active development. As such, while this *is* playable, expect there to be bugs and limited features. We appreciate your playtesting!

- Friends that are forgiving and understanding so that if your multi-hour run breaks due to a bug, they won't mind :smile:

## What's **NOT** Included

  - This is a popular request, but it will not be something we work on until *everything else* is stable.
- Shopsanity
- Goldsanity
- Progressive Rest/Smith
- Death Link

- Polish

- There is no saving.
  - If you exit the game then reboot it, you might have problems.
  - If you end a run early and find a way to resume it, you WILL have problems.
- If you receive a Character Unlock while you're on the Character Select screen, they won't unlock until you revisit that screen after doing a run (likely an edge case for most)
- Every time you click a Card Reward in the Archipelago Loot UI, it will close that window, and to get subsequent Card Rewards you've received, you need to re-open the menu
- Card Rewards, if skipped, are not returned until the next run. This is different than Slay the Spire 1's implementation. It will likely change in the future.
- Originally, we were going to support the setting that allows all Characters unlocked from the start, but that will take some more debugging before it's ready for primetime
- While all Relics and Card Rewards are unlocked for you automatically, the only Potions you can receive are the Potions you start the game with. Any Potion locked behind an Epoch will not show up.

## Common Q&A

### Will this mess with my Save File?

My understanding is that when StS runs modded, it uses a different set of Save Files. So your *vanilla* save files should be totally unbothered by this mod.

### I installed the AP World but it's not working

Are your Archipelago Launcher v0.6.7 or later? If not it **won't work**. You either need an official build, or if none is out yet, you need to build it from the source code!

### I closed out of the game and it's behaving weird when I re-open it

This is very early development, we expect it not to work right and not to save progress when you close the game.

### (Your-Feature-Here) looks really ugly or isn't polished

We probably know and are going to work on it, but if it's egregious or an edge case, please reach out and let us know more about it so we can look into it!
alpha.title: v0.1.0-alpha

v0.2.5-alpha.description:
> [!WARNING]
> Both Slay the Spire II and this Archipelago Mod are in active development. As such, while this _is_ playable, expect there to be bugs and limited features. We appreciate your playtesting!

# Changelist

> [!CAUTION]
> This build was supposed to fix Goal trigger conditions, but it doesn't seem to. We'll keep working on a new fix.

# Mod Information

## Pre-Requisites

- **Your Slay the Spire II client must be running on Windows**. The debug terminal we use uses Win32 APIs.
  - This will not be a requirement long-term, but for early Alpha development it's necessary.
- **Your host MUST use Archipelago Client v0.6.7+**.
  - The current official release is v0.6.6, so you need to be able to build the `main` branch of Archipelago [from source](https://github.com/ArchipelagoMW/Archipelago) or download and use the [0.6.7 RC](https://github.com/ArchipelagoMW/Archipelago/releases/tag/0.6.7-rc1).
  - **However**, once the game has been generated, it can still be hosted on [www.archipelago.gg](www.archipelago.gg)
- If your installation of Slay the Spire II is **higher than v0.99** this mod _may_ not work. We will do our best to keep up with game updates as they release.
- Friends that are forgiving and understanding so that if your multi-hour run breaks due to a bug, they won't mind :smile:

## What's Included

- Locations for Card Rewards, Rare Card Rewards, Relics, and Pressing Start with a Character
- Card Rewards, Rare Card Rewards, Character Unlocks, Relics, and Filler Gold in the Item Pool
- Floorsanity
- Configurable Goal for beating the game with 1-5 characters
- Configurable Ascension Level _(Highly recommend using 1+, or you may not reach all Relic Rewards in logic)_
- Configurable Characters to use in the Archipelago
- Configurable: Either all Card Rewards are AP Locations, or every other card reward is an AP Location

> [!IMPORTANT]
> There's not a lot of settings but we wanted to get a playable build out as quick as possible so people can dive in. More features and stability coming very soon!

## What's **NOT** Included

- **Multiplayer Support**
  - This is a popular request, but it will not be something we work on until _everything else_ is stable.
- Shopsanity
- Goldsanity
- Progressive Rest/Smith
- Death Link
- Traps
- Interesting Filler Items
- Polish

## Known Issues/Limitations

- There is no saving.
  - If you exit the game then reboot it, you might have problems.
  - If you end a run early and find a way to resume it, you WILL have problems.
- If you receive a Character Unlock while you're on the Character Select screen, they won't unlock until you revisit that screen after doing a run (likely an edge case for most)
- Card Rewards, if skipped, are not returned until the next run. This is different than Slay the Spire 1's implementation. It will likely change in the future.
- Originally, we were going to support the setting that allows all Characters unlocked from the start, but that will take some more debugging before it's ready for primetime

## Common Q&A

### Will this mess with my Save File?

My understanding is that when StS runs modded, it uses a different set of Save Files. So your _vanilla_ save files should be totally unbothered by this mod.

### I installed the AP World but it's not working

Is your Archipelago Launcher v0.6.7 or later? If not it **won't work**. You either need an official build, or if none is out yet, you need to build it from the source code!

### I closed out of the game and it's behaving weird when I re-open it

This is very early development, we expect it not to work right and not to save progress when you close the game.

### (Your-Feature-Here) looks really ugly or isn't polished

We probably know and are going to work on it, but if it's egregious or an edge case, please reach out and let us know more about it so we can look into it!
v0.2.5-alpha.title: v0.2.5-alpha

v0.3.0-alpha.description:
> [!WARNING]
> Both Slay the Spire II and this Archipelago Mod are in active development. As such, while this _is_ playable, expect there to be bugs and limited features. We appreciate your playtesting!

# Changelist

* feat: ensure connection doesn't proceed if apworld and client have version mismatch by @dlueben1 in https://github.com/dlueben1/Slay-the-Spire-2-Archipelago/pull/82
* feat: add goldsanity by @dlueben1 in https://github.com/dlueben1/Slay-the-Spire-2-Archipelago/pull/78
* feat: add campfire sanity by @cjmang in https://github.com/dlueben1/Slay-the-Spire-2-Archipelago/pull/69
* feat: show mod version in UI at all times by @dlueben1 in https://github.com/dlueben1/Slay-the-Spire-2-Archipelago/pull/64
* fix: resolve A10 issue by @cjmang in https://github.com/dlueben1/Slay-the-Spire-2-Archipelago/pull/65
* fix: add goal condition notification to the AP Server by @Lyxn-M in https://github.com/dlueben1/Slay-the-Spire-2-Archipelago/pull/66
* refactor: improve archipelago button and show number of unclaimed items on it by @dlueben1 in https://github.com/dlueben1/Slay-the-Spire-2-Archipelago/pull/76
* refactor: relic details are now shown in reward UI instead of generic relic by @dlueben1 in https://github.com/dlueben1/Slay-the-Spire-2-Archipelago/pull/80

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/dlueben1/Slay-the-Spire-2-Archipelago/compare/v0.2.5-alpha...v0.3.0-alpha

# Mod Information

## Pre-Requisites

- **Your Slay the Spire II client must be running on Windows**. The debug terminal we use uses Win32 APIs.
  - This will not be a requirement long-term, but for early Alpha development it's necessary.
- **Your host MUST use Archipelago Client v0.6.7+**.
  - The current official release is v0.6.6, so you need to be able to build the `main` branch of Archipelago [from source](https://github.com/ArchipelagoMW/Archipelago) or download and use the [0.6.7 RC](https://github.com/ArchipelagoMW/Archipelago/releases/tag/0.6.7-rc1).
  - **However**, once the game has been generated, it can still be hosted on [www.archipelago.gg](www.archipelago.gg)
- This version of the mod is intended to be used for **v0.99.1** of Slay the Spire II
  - **You must be on the "Default Public Version" of the game, _NOT_ the public beta branch**
  - If your installation of Slay the Spire II is higher or lower than this, the mod _may_ not work.
  - We will do our best to keep up with game updates as they release, so please be patient.
- Friends that are forgiving and understanding so that if your multi-hour run breaks due to a bug, they won't mind :smile:

## Installing the Mod

1. Download the "sts2-client.zip" from the [Releases](https://github.com/dlueben1/Slay-the-Spire-2-Archipelago/releases/latest) section of the Repo
2. Go to your Slay the Spire II directory (In Steam, click "Browse Local Files")
3. If a folder called `mods` does not exist, create it
4. Unzip the **contents** of `sts2-client.zip` into `mods`

- If you've done this step correctly, your directory structure should look like this: `/<slay-the-spire-2-local-files>/mods/Archipelago/` and the contents of that folder should be a bunch of `.dll` files and a `.pck` file (there may be more files too, please don't touch anything in this folder)

5. Start the game

### Additional Steps for **Hosts**

6. Download `spire2.apworld`
7. Open your Archipelago Launcher
8. Click "Install APWorld"
9. Select `spire2.apworld` in the file dialog that pops up
10. **Restart the Archipelago Launcher**
11. Now you should be able to properly host/generate an Archipelago Session with StS 2
  - If you want to use `archipelago.gg` to host the game, generate it locally first following the steps above, then upload the `.zip` file from the `output` folder in your Archipelago installation

> [!IMPORTANT]
> You need to use Archipelago Version 0.6.7+ and CANNOT use earlier versions of Archipelago with this mod!

## Known Issues/Limitations

- There is no saving.
  - If you exit the game then reboot it, you might have problems.
  - If you end a run early and find a way to resume it, you WILL have problems.
- If you receive a Character Unlock while you're on the Character Select screen, they won't unlock until you revisit that screen after doing a run (likely an edge case for most)
- **Card Rewards, if skipped, are not returned until the next run. This is different than Slay the Spire 1's implementation. It will likely change in the future.**

## Common Q&A

### Will this mess with my Save File?

My understanding is that when StS runs modded, it uses a different set of Save Files. So your _vanilla_ save files should be totally unbothered by this mod.

### I installed the AP World but it's not working

Is your Archipelago Launcher v0.6.7 or later? If not it **won't work**. You either need an official build, or if none is out yet, you need to build it from the source code!

### I closed out of the game and it's behaving weird when I re-open it

This is very early development, we expect it not to work right and not to save progress when you close the game.

### (Your-Feature-Here) looks really ugly or isn't polished

We probably know and are going to work on it, but if it's egregious or an edge case, please reach out and let us know more about it so we can look into it!
